implementationSummary: Documented both ADR-034 Business OAuth production redirect URLs and TIKTOK_BUSINESS_* env/Secrets Manager keys in app-review, smoke-checklist, and vps-wiring runbooks plus api.env.example; extended smoke-test.sh with non-5xx GETs for Advertiser and account-holder callbacks; added high-risk portal URI rename notes; locked with test_biz_oauth_ops_docs.py.
assumptions: Business app id/secret keys are TIKTOK_BUSINESS_APP_ID and TIKTOK_BUSINESS_APP_SECRET as used by #490/#491 handlers.
Smoke checklist AC is satisfied by documenting and scripting non-5xx GETs; live VPS HITL still required to mark checklist items complete.
vps-wiring-runbook needs no OAuth path edits — Nginx already proxies /v1/* to juli-api.
risks: Production Secrets Manager juli/api/production may still lack TIKTOK_BUSINESS_* keys until an operator puts them — docs alone do not provision secrets.
Existing #261 sign-off record remains historical; new Business checklist rows stay unchecked until live smoke.
